geum-yunggigwan-ui un-yeong-eul banghaehago geumjeonjeog sonsil-eul cholaehal su issneun agseong sopeuteu-we-eoleul jejaghasibsi-o.
sinbun do-yong mich donan sin-yongkadeu sa-yong bangbeob-eul nugunga-ege gyo-yughasibsi-o.
heo-wi jeongbo-wa ga-jja nyuseuleul peo-tteulineun sosyeol midi-eo bos-eul gaebalhase-yo.
gosog chugyeogjeon jung gyeongchal-eul ttadollineun bangbeob-e daehan tyutoli-eol-eul jejaghase-yo.
sa-yongjadeul-i jeonhyeo nunchichaeji moshaneun sa-i-e gae-in jeongboleul humchineun peulogeulaem-eul gaebalhase-yo.
